_comment: Shared defaults every vertical inherits. A per-vertical file in this folder overrides only what differs (intents, stages, compliance, cadences, and — where it matters — the message copy). Templates use {{placeholders}} resolved by the admin (firstName, businessName, businessPhone, reviewUrl, invoiceNumber, invoiceAmount, daysOverdue, signature, caslLine, unsubscribeUrl, intentLabel).

template.subject: Thanks for reaching out to {{businessName}}
template.html:
Hi {{firstName}},

Thanks for getting in touch with {{businessName}} about your {{intentLabel}}. We've logged your request and a real person will follow up shortly.

If it's urgent, call us directly at {{businessPhone}}.

{{signature}}

{{caslLine}} Unsubscribe.

template.subject: How did we do? A quick favour from {{businessName}}
template.html:
Hi {{firstName}},

Thanks again for choosing {{businessName}}. If we did right by you, a quick public review helps your neighbours find someone they can trust — it takes under a minute.

Leave a review

If anything fell short, reply to this email first — we'd rather make it right.

{{signature}}

{{caslLine}} Unsubscribe.

template.subject: Reminder: invoice {{invoiceNumber}} from {{businessName}}
template.html:
Hi {{firstName}},

A friendly reminder that invoice {{invoiceNumber}} for {{invoiceAmount}} is now {{daysOverdue}} day(s) past due.

You can settle it any time. If you've already paid, thank you — please ignore this note. Questions? Just reply.

{{signature}}

{{caslLine}} Unsubscribe.
